title: Crumbly Wholesome Kenyan Dried White Beans Wrap
description: A quick-fix Kenyan dish featuring dried white beans, mortar-pestle-pound, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients wrapped in a pandan leaf.
instructions: Soak the dried white beans overnight in water.
Drain and rinse the soaked white beans, then transfer them to a mortar and pestle.
Pound the white beans into a coarse paste using the mortar and pestle.
Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the minced ginger and saut40e for 1 minute.
Add the minced garlic and saut40e for another minute.
Add the coriander powder and cumin powder, and stir well.
Add the pounded white bean paste and stir well.
If using ayurvedic ghee, add it now and stir well.
Warm the pandan leaves by wrapping them in a damp cloth and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Place a portion of the white bean mixture onto the center of a pandan leaf.
Fold the bottom half of the leaf up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
